role_title: Staff Software Technical Program Manager - Autonomy & Robotics

location.office_time_required: some amount of travel to our different deployment areas

level_signals: 8+ years of industry experience working in engineering and/or program management
Comp range $193,800–$285,000 base consistent with Staff IC at DoorDash
Expected to interface with executive leadership for program status

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of industry experience working in engineering and/or program management
In-depth understanding of autonomy and autonomy feature validation strategies in simulation, closed course testing, and on public roads
In-depth experience with the software development life cycle
Demonstrated success taking software products or features from concept to production
A track record of managing complex, cross-functional programs with significant ambiguity
The ability to operate from a deep technical level all the way up to providing comprehensive program status to executive leadership
A B.S., M.S., or Ph.D. in STEM
Working experience with program management tools, such as Jira, Confluence, Smartsheet/MS Project, Google Workspace applications

scope.surface: Autonomy software stack for autonomous delivery robots (Perception, Planning, Localization, System Safety, Simulation, Remote Assistance)
scope.business_model: last-mile autonomous delivery, B2C and B2B logistics platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Autonomy feature delivery from concept to validated public-roads driving
Scale and optimization of last-mile deliveries using autonomy
Cross-functional program completion rates and issue resolution
core_responsibilities: Program manage and help lead development for software stack within Perception, Planning, Localization, System Safety, Simulation and Remote Assistance
Drive completion of autonomy features from requirements or engineering concept to validated public roads driving
Work with leaders and engineers across Autonomy, Software, Product, QA, and Ops to plan, track, follow up and resolve issues
Interface with autonomy teams, software, safety, and operations teams on a daily basis to drive autonomy stack capabilities forward
Provide comprehensive program status to executive leadership

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and wide ($193,800–$285,000 base)
Remote role with travel flexibility rather than strict on-site requirement
Clear product surface: autonomous delivery robots at DoorDash Labs
Equity grants mentioned as part of compensation
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Explicit D&I commitments and encouragement for diverse candidates
red_flags: Travel requirement to 'different deployment areas' not quantified — could be significant
No nice-to-haves listed, making the bar feel rigid with limited flexibility
STEM degree explicitly required with no equivalent-experience clause, which is a hard filter
Visa sponsorship not mentioned, leaving work authorization unclear
Wide comp range ($193K–$285K) suggests significant uncertainty in leveling

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 'Staff' title, 8+ years requirement, and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
ambiguities: The role is described as 'remote, with some amount of travel to our different deployment areas' — travel frequency and extent are not quantified, making fully-remote classification approximate.

Compensation range is stated as a national US range including Illinois and Colorado but is also noted as 'localized according to an employee's work location' — actual pay for a given location may differ significantly from the stated range.
